declared_losses.what_was_lost: The 'topic_seed' strand and its central concept, including all associated claims and semantic content.
declared_losses.why: Explicit editorial decision to retire the strand. The concept is not carried forward under any name, paraphrase, or implied reference.

declared_losses.why: Explicit editorial decision to retire the strand. The concept is not carried forward under any name, paraphrase, or implied reference.

post_tensor.instructions_for_next: The next cycle is a free story write. No topic is seeded. Use only the narrator_voice strand as a guide: reflective, sensory-grounded, attentive to small physical detail. Let subject matter emerge organically from the writing act. Watch for whether a new thematic strand crystallizes during composition — if it does, it should be named and integrated into the tensor post-write.
open_questions: What subject matter or scene will the narrator voice attach to in the next cycle?
Are there any additional stylistic or structural constraints to be introduced before writing begins?

strands.content: A reflective narrator who notices small physical details and favors concrete sensory grounding. This voice is carried forward as the stylistic foundation for whatever story emerges next. No topic constraint is imposed — the voice is free to attach to any subject matter.

key_claims.text: The narrator favors concrete sensory detail.
The narrator voice is the only inherited constraint from prior cycles.

strands.title: narrator_voice
